---
title: "Gang He"
subtitle: |
  Associate Professor \
  Marxe School of Public and International Affairs \
  Baruch College \
  City University of New York \
  Email: gang.he@baruch.cuny.edu
description-meta: "Gang He is an energy scholar, researcher, and teacher. He is an Associate Professor at the Marxe School of Public and International Affairs, Baruch College, City University of New York. He studies and teaches energy systems, energy and climate policy, and clean energy transition."
image: "files/profile/Gang_He_2025_CUNY_2.jpg"
page-navigation: false
toc: false
#sidebar: false
page-layout: custom
css: index.css
format:
  html:
    link-external-icon: false
    include-in-header:
      - file: files/includes/_mswebmaster.js
      - text: |
          <style>
          .quarto-title-block { display: none; }
          </style>

listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    exclude:
      categories: [paper, featured]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"
  - id: latest-papers
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    include:
      categories: [paper]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title, subtitle]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"         
  - id: featured-posts
    contents: 
      - posts
      - posts/post-links.yml
    include:
      categories: [featured]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    max-items: 3
#    image-height: 150px
    page-size: 3 #set same as max-times to remove the page number setting
    fields: [image, date, title]
    max-description-length: 75
    sort: 
      - "date desc"
      - "title asc"      

---

<link rel="me" href="https://mastodon.social/@hegang">

<!--This is my personal clarity, please delete or replace with your own clarity-->
{{< include /files/includes/_msclarity.qmd >}}

::: {.background-frame .alt-background}
::: {.content-block}

<div style="height: 40px;"></div>

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .hero-left}

[![](files/profile/Gang_He_2025_CUNY_2.jpg){width=90% fig-align="center"}](bio.qmd)

:::


::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7 .hero-right}

<p align="center" style="font-size:2rem; font-weight:bold;">Gang He</p>

<p align="center" style="font-size:1.5rem;">
Associate Professor of Energy and Climate Policy\
Marxe School of Public and International Affairs\
Baruch College and Graduate Center\
City University of New York \
Email: gang.he@baruch.cuny.edu
</p>

::: {.button}
[Full Bio](bio.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::


<p align="center" style="font-size:2rem;">
[{{< fa sun >}}](https://deeppolicylab.github.io){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< fa globe >}}](https://www.baruch.cuny.edu/profiles/faculty/Gang-He){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai google-scholar >}}](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=vf90AuEAAAAJ){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai researchgate >}}](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gang-He-19){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai orcid >}}](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8416-1965){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai clarivate >}}](https://www.webofscience.com/wos/author/record/N-4549-2013){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai scopus >}}](https://www.scopus.com/authid/detail.uri?authorId=55607981900){style="color: #05336B;"}&ensp;[{{< ai semantic-scholar >}}](https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Gang-He/49430802){style="color: #05336B;"}  
</p>

:::

:::

:::
:::


::: {.background-frame}
::: {.content-block}

<p align="center" style="font-size:32px; font-weight:bold;">Recent Posts</p>

:::{#recent-posts}
:::

::: {.button}
[More posts](posts.qmd){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.background-frame .alt-background}
::: {.content-block}

<p align="center" style="font-size:32px; font-weight:bold;">Latest Papers</p>

:::{#latest-papers}
:::

::: {.button}
[More papers](posts.qmd#category=paper){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.background-frame}
::: {.content-block}

<p align="center" style="font-size:32px; font-weight:bold;">Featured Posts</p>

:::{#featured-posts}
:::

::: {.button}
[More featured](posts.qmd#category=featured){.btn-action-primary .btn-action .btn .btn-success .btn-lg role="button" style="margin-top: 0em;"}
:::

:::
:::
